MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Brian Gearinger, Deputy City Attorney 554-3914 for defendants JONATHAN LAM and CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO moving for determination of good faith settlement
Paula K. Bauer, Esq. 566-0522 for Plaintiff BETTY HUGGINS contesting the good faith settlement
Cherie J. Herman, Esq. 650/579-1422 for defendant MARY WAKEFIELD also contesting the good faith settlement
Argued and the Court determined that $5000 ($2200 medical and specials) is the good faith settlement. Request for sanctions denied. (JJM/af) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
